case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. PAMLETTA DAWSON et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED JAN-19-2004, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DAWSON, PAMLETTA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAWSON, PAMLETTA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 24 NICHOLS WAY, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
